All Rules.sectionDescription: Rules to measure other audits against

AllRules.title: All Rules
AllRules.description: All rules - The denominator into which other audits will divide to determine the percentage of rules they match.

Logging.sectionDescription: Audits related to logging and log forwarding

NoLog.title: Unlogged
NoLog.description: Rules that neither log at start nor end. Few rules should be processed silently.

LogStart.title: LogStart
LogStart.description: Rules that log at session start for troubleshooting purposes. Log-at-end is preferred for normal logging as all data will be available at session end.

LogEnd.title: LogEnd
LogEnd.description: Rules that log at session end. Almost all rules should log at end.

Unforwarded.title: Unforwarded
Unforwarded.description: Rules which lack a log forwarding profile. If a log is not forwarded to external (SIEM) storage there will be no record of it once it expires from local storage.

Application Of Security Profiles.sectionDescription: Audits related to security profile application

NoSecProf.title: NoSecProf
NoSecProf.description: Allow rules that don't have security profiles applied, functioning as a layer 4 ACL without NGFW inspection

SecProfNotGroup.title: SecProfNotGroup
SecProfNotGroup.description: Rules that use individual security profiles instead of profile groups

SecProfDeny.title: SecProfDeny
SecProfDeny.description: Rules that deny traffic but have security profiles. Attempting to apply inspection to blocked traffic is an oxymoron.

Use of 'Any'.sectionDescription: Audits related to the use of 'any' in rules

AllowAnyAppAnyPort.title: AllowAnyAppAnyPort
AllowAnyAppAnyPort.description: Rules that allow any application on any port; Very few source/dest pairs should have unlimited access.

AllowAnyApp.title: AllowAnyApp
AllowAnyApp.description: Rules that allow any application; Few source/dest pairs should have unrestricted app access

AllowAnyPort.title: AllowAnyPort
AllowAnyPort.description: Rules that allow an app on any port. Proper App-ID adoption requires specific, preferably 'app default', ports

DenyAppNonAnyPort.title: DenyAppNonAnyPort
DenyAppNonAnyPort.description: Rules that deny an app on specific ports. Most app denials should be regardless of port

AnySourceAnyDest.title: AnySourceAnyDest
AnySourceAnyDest.description: A "Least Privilege Check": Rules with any source and any destination IP. Few rules should allow access regardless of IP.

AnyAnySource.title: AnyAnySource
AnyAnySource.description: A "Least Privilege Check": Rules with any source and any source zone; Very few rules should ignore the source address.

AnyIPSource.title: AnyIPSource
AnyIPSource.description: A "Least Privilege Check": Rules with any source. It is preferable to filter source IP's to required hosts

AnyAnyDest.title: AnyAnyDest
AnyAnyDest.description: Rules with any destination and any destination zone

SPG-AllRules.title: SPG-AllRules
SPG-AllRules.description: Rules that use the {spgName} security profile group

SPG-Allows.title: SPG-Allows
SPG-Allows.description: Allow rules that use the {spgName} security profile group
